items.title: Bahrain and Kuwait face Iranian fire as U.S. airstrikes expand to target more bridges
items.summary: For the first time in this latest round of violence, strikes also reached into areas around Iran's capital, Tehran, showing a widening set of targets for the Americans

items.title: ISC Class 12 Improvement Result 2026 Out, Rechecking Window Open Till July 20
items.summary: ISC Class 12 Improvement Result 2026 has been announced by CISCE. Students can check their scorecards online and apply for rechecking until July 20.
